Drag audio into your DAW

Files from ~/Downloads plus bundled resources, served over the eacp bridge. Hit ▶ to play in-app (streamed off disk via the built-in audiofile:// scheme — drag the playhead to seek), click to select (⌘/⇧-click to multi-select), then drag the selection onto a DAW track.
